params.name: Book of Nuevosken
params.description: The Book of Nuevosken is a book that systematically introduces magical knowledge. It provides a detailed classification of various magic and explains the principles and history of magic drawing, spells, prayers, incantations, and magic circles in an easy-to-understand manner. It is a necessary textbook for students at the Hogton Wizardry School...
